name: Exposing the CSI
summary: Large modern-WiFi experimental collection designed to study how bandwidth, MIMO, spectral resolution, hardware, and environment affect sensing.

settings.scenario: Multiple controlled experiments varying WiFi configuration, collectors, target positions, and sensing conditions

original.license: Zenodo record terms; verify per archive

standardization.notes: Treat bandwidth, MIMO mode, collector, position, and experiment as explicit domain fields rather than collapsing them.
